title: Align verify/review command inventory source of truth
description:
## Problem
/verify and /review used different command inventory sources: /verify considered working-tree command files while /review considered tracked HEAD. This produced contradictory guidance around untracked .omp/commands/*.md files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- /verify.md tells agents to use git ls-files for shipped command inventory checks.
- /verify.md treats untracked command files as separate out-of-scope or must-commit evidence, not automatic README requirements.
- /review.md uses the same tracked-command source of truth and flags verify evidence that used working-tree globs.
- Checks pass: git diff --check, br lint, br dep cycles.
close_reason: verify/review command inventory source of truth aligned and verified

comments.author: default
comments.text: Implemented source-of-truth alignment in .omp/commands/verify.md and .omp/commands/review.md. Verification evidence: git diff --check passed; br lint br-omp-backbone-skill-26p returned total 0; br dep cycles returned count 0; token check confirmed both command files contain git ls-files and git status --short .omp/commands.

title: Post-review cleanup: fix Codex findings, trim conventions.md, harden success criteria
Fix /init hydration: project name precedence, goal auto-fill, conventions over-inference
description:
Address the three review findings from br-omp-backbone-skill-9tl review: 1) Project name precedence should be git-remote-first not README-first per PRD, 2) Goal field should remain human-only TODO markers per PRD, 3) Conventions hydration should be more conservative for Frontend and Scripts rows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- In init.md Phase 2.5 Python block, project_name fallback chain is git_remote_name() → package_json.name → first_heading_from_readme() → root.name → "Untitled Project".
- In init.md Phase 2.5 Python block, project_desc always resolves to <!-- TODO: fill in your project goal --> with no README auto-fill.
- In init.md Phase 2.5 Python block, Frontend row only hydrates when frontend framework dependencies are detected in package.json: react, svelte, vue, next, nuxt, astro, angular, or solid.
- In init.md Phase 2.5 Python block, Scripts language infers TypeScript only when tsx or ts-node is a dependency; otherwise defaults to Bash.
- Conventions rows for Frontend/Scripts leave TODO markers when evidence is absent.
- Existing correct hydration for Backend, tech-stack, gotchas, and decisions is unchanged.
- The script remains idempotent: re-running /init on already-hydrated memory files does not overwrite user edits.
close_reason: Implemented in commit c0fb82e. Verified: 10/10 behavioral, 13/13 review, 0 br lint issues, 0 cycles. Pushed to main. All 7 acceptance criteria met.
